---
## First run: python xlsx_to_yml.py to convert publications.xlsx to publications.yml
## then run quarto render to generate the publications.html file, need pub-listing.ejs and pub-listing.css in the same folder
## Currently has redundant ::: code blocks end of listings, need to remove them in the html file
title: "Publications"
description-meta: "Information, PDFs, and metrics of papers"
title-block-banner: false
listing:
  - id: selected-work
    contents: publications.yml
    type: custom
    page-size: 100
    categories: numbered
    template: pub-listing.ejs
    include:
      section: "Selected Work"
  - id: peer-reviewed
    contents: publications.yml
    type: custom
    page-size: 100
    categories: numbered
    template: pub-listing.ejs
    include:
      section: "Peer-reviewed Journal Paper"
css: pub-listing.css
---

<!-- {{< include /files/includes/_msclarity.qmd >}} -->
{{< include /files/includes/_academic.qmd >}}

Note: \* corresponding author; ![](/files/images/highly-cited-paper-badge.png "ESI Highly Cited Paper"){width=20 fig-alt="Highly cited paper"} ESI [Highly Cited Paper](https://webofscience.help.clarivate.com/en-us/Content/esi-highly-cited-papers.html) (top 1%); ![](/files/images/hot-paper-badge.png "ESI Hot Paper"){width=20 fig-alt="Hot paper"} ESI [Hot Paper](https://webofscience.help.clarivate.com/en-us/Content/esi-hot-papers.html) (top 0.1%)

Total citations as of February 2026:

- [Web of Science](https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/A-2258-2014): 56,478 (h-index = 101)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.co.uk/citations?hl=en&user=cVKF81gAAAAJ): 92,159 (h-index = 123, i10-index = 3715)

## Selected Work

::: {#selected-work}


## Peer-reviewed Journal Papers

::: {#peer-reviewed}




{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
